description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, upholstered in a dark, smooth material that appears to be faux leather or high-quality vinyl. The sofa features three large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion for the main section, with an extended chaise cushion forming the L-shape. The armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, matching the overall geometric and minimalist design. The legs are short and mostly hidden, giving the sofa a low-profile appearance and a sense of stability. The upholstery is solid in color, with a subtle sheen that suggests a slightly glossy finish. This piece is suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, dark smooth upholstery, and boxy padded armrests. Features three back cushions and a continuous seat, with a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, three back cushions, left-facing chaise, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the armrest and the thickness of the backrest, with the chaise extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, continuous backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right armrest and the full length of the chaise section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform, attached back cushions and a single continuous seat cushion with an extended chaise section; all cushions are rectangular and flush with the sofa frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Boxy, straight armrests at both ends, padded and at the same height as the backrest, with no decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs, mostly hidden from view, likely positioned at the corners and possibly with a central support; no visible decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest segmented into three attached cushions, with a flat top and no tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark color with a smooth, slightly glossy finish; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
